# Instructions

- Following Playwright test failed.
- Explain why, be concise, respect Playwright best practices.
- Provide a snippet of code with the fix, if possible.

# Test info

- Name: ds3-validation.spec.ts >> DS-3 Program Name Validation & Duplicate Prevention (Didaxis Studio) >> TC-003 - Internal whitespace is preserved; only edges are trimmed
- Location: tests/ds3-validation.spec.ts:68:7

# Error details

```
Error: expect(locator).toHaveCount(expected) failed

Locator:  getByText('   I.G. Trim Edges Only 05/Jun/2026 [03:57:53]   ', { exact: true })
Expected: 0
Received: 1
Timeout:  5000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveCount" with timeout 5000ms
  - waiting for getByText('   I.G. Trim Edges Only 05/Jun/2026 [03:57:53]   ', { exact: true })
    14 × locator resolved to 1 element
       - unexpected value "1"

```

```yaml
        - paragraph [ref=e572]: Select a program to manage semesters
```

# Test source

```ts
  1   | import { test, expect } from '../fixtures/cleanup.fixture';
  2   | import { clickCreateAndTrack, createProgram } from './helpers/program';
  3   | import { openNewProgramModal, openEditModal } from './helpers/programs-ui';
  4   | import { ProgramsPage } from '../pages/programs.page';
  5   | import { AppShell } from '../pages/app-shell.page';
  6   | import type { Dialog } from '@playwright/test';
  7   | import { format } from 'date-fns';
  8   | 
  9   | /**
  10  |  * Build a unique, human-readable suffix for test data so each run produces
  11  |  * fresh program names that don't collide with previous runs or seed data.
  12  |  * Shape: "dd/MMM/yyyy [hh:mm:ss]" e.g. "17/May/2026 [19:25:03]".
  13  |  */
  14  | function uniqueSuffix(): string {
  15  |   const now = new Date();
  16  |   const hh = now.getHours().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  17  |   const mm = now.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  18  |   const ss = now.getSeconds().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  19  | 
  20  |   const timeString = `${hh}:${mm}:${ss}`;
  21  | 
  22  |   return `${format(now, 'dd/MMM/yyyy')} [${timeString}]`;
  23  | }
  24  | 
  25  | test.describe('DS-3 Program Name Validation & Duplicate Prevention (Didaxis Studio)', () => {
  26  |   // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  27  |   // Positive flows
  28  |   // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  29  | 
  30  |   test('TC-001 - Name with allowed special characters is accepted (AC2 verbatim)', async ({ page }) => {
  31  |     // The AC2 string is quoted verbatim per the plan's "Note on test data".
  32  |     // To keep the test independent and idempotent across runs, we tag it with
  33  |     // a timestamp so each run still creates a fresh row.
  34  |     const programName = `Informatique & IA - Niveau 2 ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  35  |     const description = `I.G. ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  36  | 
  37  |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  38  |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  39  |     await modal.fillProgramName(programName);
  40  |     await modal.fillDescription(description);
  41  |     await clickCreateAndTrack(page, modal);
  42  | 
  43  |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeHidden();
  44  |     const row = programs.row(programName);
  45  |     await expect(row).toBeVisible();
  46  |     // No HTML-encoded entities: the ampersand must render as "&", not "&amp;".
  47  |     await expect(programs.exactText(programName)).toHaveCount(1);
  48  |     await expect(row).not.toContainText('&amp;');
  49  |   });
  50  | 
  51  |   test('TC-002 - Smart quotes, apostrophe, and accented Unicode are accepted', async ({ page }) => {
  52  |     const programName = `I.G. Renée's "Accelerated" 2026 ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  53  | 
  54  |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  55  |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  56  |     await modal.fillProgramName(programName);
  57  |     await modal.fillDescription('I.G. unicode positive');
  58  |     await clickCreateAndTrack(page, modal);
  59  | 
  60  |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeHidden();
  61  |     await expect(programs.exactText(programName)).toHaveCount(1);
  62  | 
  63  |     // Re-opening edit (per DS-2) shows the same characters byte-for-byte.
  64  |     const edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  65  |     await expect(edit.programNameInput).toHaveValue(programName);
  66  |   });
  67  | 
  68  |   test('TC-003 - Internal whitespace is preserved; only edges are trimmed', async ({ page }) => {
  69  |     const innerName = `I.G. Trim Edges Only ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  70  |     const paddedName = `   ${innerName}   `;
  71  | 
  72  |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  73  |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  74  |     await modal.fillProgramName(paddedName);
  75  |     await modal.fillDescription('I.G. trim');
  76  |     await clickCreateAndTrack(page, modal);
  77  | 
  78  |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeHidden();
  79  |     // Row name is exactly the trimmed inner string — leading/trailing spaces stripped.
  80  |     await expect(programs.exactText(innerName)).toHaveCount(1);
  81  |     // The padded (untrimmed) form must NOT appear as a row name.
> 82  |     await expect(programs.exactText(paddedName)).toHaveCount(0);
      |                                                  ^ Error: expect(locator).toHaveCount(expected) failed
  83  |   });
  84  | 
  85  |   test('TC-004 - Mixed case, digits, and punctuation all create successfully', async ({ page }) => {
  86  |     const programName = `I.G. CS-101 / 2026 (Cohort #2) ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  87  | 
  88  |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  89  |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  90  |     await modal.fillProgramName(programName);
  91  |     await modal.fillDescription('I.G. mixed');
  92  |     await clickCreateAndTrack(page, modal);
  93  | 
  94  |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeHidden();
  95  |     await expect(programs.exactText(programName)).toHaveCount(1);
  96  |   });
  97  | 
  98  |   // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  99  |   // Negative flows
  100 |   // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  101 | 
  102 |   test('TC-005 - Whitespace-only name (3 spaces) is rejected — form not submitted (AC1 verbatim)', async ({ page }) => {
  103 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  104 |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  105 | 
  106 |     // Track any POST /api/programs traffic — none should occur for this case.
  107 |     let postCount = 0;
  108 |     page.on('request', (req) => {
  109 |       if (req.method() === 'POST' && /\/api\/programs(\?|$)/.test(req.url())) {
  110 |         postCount++;
  111 |       }
  112 |     });
  113 | 
  114 |     await modal.fillProgramName('   ');
  115 |     await modal.fillDescription('I.G. ws-only desc');
  116 | 
  117 |     // Form must not submit: button disabled is the current (preferred) UX.
  118 |     await expect(modal.createButton).toBeDisabled();
  119 |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeVisible();
  120 | 
  121 |     // No row literally named "   " or "" should ever exist.
  122 |     await expect(programs.exactText('   ')).toHaveCount(0);
  123 |     expect(postCount).toBe(0);
  124 |   });
  125 | 
  126 |   test('TC-006 - Completely empty name is rejected (DS-1 AC3 cross-coverage)', async ({ page }) => {
  127 |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  128 | 
  129 |     await expect(modal.createButton).toBeDisabled();
  130 | 
  131 |     // Pressing Enter in an empty Program Name must not submit.
  132 |     await modal.focusProgramName();
  133 |     await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
  134 |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeVisible();
  135 |     await expect(modal.createButton).toBeDisabled();
  136 |   });
  137 | 
  138 |   test('TC-007 - Tabs / newlines / non-breaking-space whitespace are treated as empty', async ({ page }) => {
  139 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  140 |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  141 | 
  142 |     // Tab + ASCII space + NBSP (U+00A0) + newline.
  143 |     const whitespaceMix = '\t \u00A0\n';
  144 | 
  145 |     await modal.fillProgramName(whitespaceMix);
  146 | 
  147 |     // Per AC1 (post-trim) the form should not be submittable.
  148 |     await expect(modal.createButton).toBeDisabled();
  149 |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeVisible();
  150 |     await expect(programs.exactText(whitespaceMix)).toHaveCount(0);
  151 |   });
  152 | 
  153 |   test('TC-008 - Creating a second program with an existing name is rejected (AC3 verbatim)', async ({ page }) => {
  154 |     const programName = `I.G. Web Development 2026 ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  155 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. dup precondition');
  156 | 
  157 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  158 |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  159 |     await modal.fillProgramName(programName);
  160 |     await modal.fillDescription('I.G. duplicate try');
  161 |     await modal.clickCreate();
  162 | 
  163 |     // Modal stays open with values preserved (per AC3 + plan).
  164 |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeVisible();
  165 |     await expect(modal.programNameInput).toHaveValue(programName);
  166 | 
  167 |     // List still contains exactly one row with that name.
  168 |     await expect(programs.exactText(programName)).toHaveCount(1);
  169 |   });
  170 | 
  171 |   test('TC-009 - Duplicate detection ignores leading/trailing whitespace in the new entry', async ({ page }) => {
  172 |     const programName = `I.G. Web Development 2026 ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  173 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. dup-trim precondition');
  174 | 
  175 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  176 |     const modal = await openNewProgramModal(page);
  177 |     await modal.fillProgramName(`   ${programName}   `);
  178 |     await modal.fillDescription('I.G. dup with padding');
  179 |     await modal.clickCreate();
  180 | 
  181 |     // After trim, the candidate matches the existing name → duplicate error.
  182 |     await expect(modal.dialog).toBeVisible();
```
